name: Out of the Blue
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>急</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>直</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>下</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Destroy this card if your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) in the Graveyard. When this card is destroyed by this effect and sent to the Graveyard, your opponent shuffles all cards in their Graveyard into the Deck.
eff: Destroy this card if your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) in the Graveyard. When this card is destroyed by this effect and sent to the Graveyard, your opponent shuffles all cards in their Graveyard into the Deck.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
